mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forward_task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM forward_task WHERE source_chat_id = #{sourceChatId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM forward_task ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM forward_task ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forward_task WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM forward_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forward_task ( source_chat_id, source_chat_title, message_id, target_chat_id, target_chat_title, status, error_message, is_auto_forward, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sourceChatId}, #{sourceChatTitle}, #{messageId}, #{targetChatId}, #{targetChatTitle}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{isAutoForward}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE forward_task SET source_chat_id = #{sourceChatId}, source_chat_title = #{sourceChatTitle}, message_id = #{messageId}, target_chat_id = #{targetChatId}, target_chat_title = #{targetChatTitle}, status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, is_auto_forward = #{isAutoForward}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
